---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible problem in tachi
labels: bug
---

> **Got a question or an unclear behavior you're not sure is a bug?**
> Try [Q&A Discussions](https://github.com/davidmatousek/tachi/discussions/categories/q-a) first. Reproducible defects go here. Usage questions go there.
>
> **Found a security vulnerability?**
> Do not post it here. Use the [private advisory flow](https://github.com/davidmatousek/tachi/security/advisories/new).

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run command '...'
2. With architecture file '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error output if any.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04, WSL]
- tachi version: [output of `git describe --tags` from your tachi clone, or the install version]
- AI Agent: [e.g., Claude Code v2.1.16, Cursor, Copilot]
- Typst version: [output of `typst --version`]
- mmdc version: [output of `mmdc --version`]

## Input Artifact (redacted)

<!-- A minimal architecture.md snippet or config that reproduces the problem. Redact anything sensitive. -->

## Additional Context

Logs, screenshots, related Issues, workarounds you've tried.
